title: DTO
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Fed-favored gauge shows central bank has more inflation-fighting work to do
Supreme Court rejects Trump’s tariffs. But he’s not out of options.
GDP report shows U.S. economic growth slowing to just 1.4% in fourth quarter
Blue-chip stocks slip as investors key on prospective ruling on Trump’s tariffs
Democrats rejoice in Supreme Court rebuke of Trump tariffs they have called illegal
items.description: President Donald Trump's tariff agenda took a blow Friday, prompting celebration from Democrats who have opposed his unilateral tariffs.

items.title: Supreme Court Trump tariffs ruling could put U.S. on hook for $175 billion in refunds, estimate says
items.description: Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh, in his dissent, warned that "the refund process" for tariffs "is likely to be a 'mess,' " citing oral arguments

items.title: Supreme Court strikes down Trump tariffs, rebuking president's signature economic policy
items.description: Trump, as recently as Thursday, has talked up the consequences of the Supreme Court striking down his tariffs prior to the seismic ruling.

items.title: Economic calendar: Friday brings PCE inflation data and fourth-quarter GDP
Trump previewed weak GDP on Truth Social ahead of official data release
items.description: Trump has revealed economic data before its official release on multiple occasions, raising questions about possible policy violations

items.title: Labor Secretary's husband barred from HQ after claims he sexually assaulted women there: MS Now
items.description: The Labor Department's inspector general is investigating the situation, and a complaint has been made to police in Washington, D.C., the report said.
